title: Why Is Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Down 7.6% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: OTIS Benefits From R&D Investments Despite China Market Woes
text: OTIS benefits from robust R&D investments and operational improvements, reflecting solid backlog and order volume. Chinese markets ail.

title: Otis: When Manufacturing Couples With Recurring Revenue
text: The elevator and escalator manufacturing industry is highly concentrated and sees only a few big players. Otis is the largest among them and, since its recent spin-off, it has been able to deliver improving results. Although orders are in decline, the service segment needs to be considered carefully as it reaches numbers worthy to look at.

title: Otis: Reaching New Heights On Core Business, Dividend Growth And Share Repurchases
text: Otis is a leading global elevator and escalator manufacturer. I believe the stock is undervalued with a potential upside of 5-20%, offering a favorable risk/reward opportunity. The company's 1H 2023 results outperformed the same period in 2022, with strong growth in its Service business; however, challenges remain, particularly in the China market and global wage inflation. I believe Otis's future success will depend on its capital allocation strategy, and its ability to secure new installation projects and convert them into Service Business customers.
